affordances.name: Governing thought integration check
affordances.mechanism: When facts and analyses exist but no governing thought exists, require the answer to connect the pieces into a small, actionable synthesis while preserving the evidence and contradictions that must be pressure-tested before the narrative becomes persuasive.

use_when: A team has many observations, analyses, or interviews but lacks a unifying insight that can guide choice and communication.
The problem is no longer finding more material, but deciding what matters, what connects, and what deserves to drive action.
The audience needs linked insight, not an evidence dump.
do_not_use_when: A polished narrative creates coherence before claims, evidence quality, or causal links have been pressure-tested.
Synthesis is used to smooth over real contradictions rather than reconcile them.
The answer summarizes material without saying what action or decision should change.
case_evidence_needed: The separate findings or analyses to integrate.
The governing thought or small set of mutually reinforcing conclusions.
The evidence quality, contradiction, or causal link that still needs pressure testing.

treatment_requirements.description: Require the answer to synthesize findings into a governing thought, explain how the pieces connect, and identify what must be pressure-tested before the synthesis drives action.
evidence_required: The contradiction or evidence gap to pressure-test.
good_output_shape: Flags the unresolved evidence or contradiction before action.

diagnostic_questions: What is the governing thought that connects these findings?
Which pieces mutually reinforce the conclusion, and which piece resists it?
What evidence or causal link must be pressure-tested before this synthesis drives action?
misuse_guards: Do not let elegant synthesis get ahead of verification.
Do not use synthesis to hide contradictions.
Do not summarize without naming the decision or action the synthesis changes.

source_evidence.source_quote: Most useful when the facts exist but no governing thought exists
Works when analysis is finished but prioritization is not
Best when the audience needs linked insight, not evidence dump

review_notes.normalization_note: Batch 11 outcome: strong_affordance_record. The source supports synthesis as actionable integration plus verification boundary.
dropped_material: Did not extract pyramid construction, dialectic, one-day answer, or persona synthesis as separate affordances.
Kept governing thought and evidence pressure-testing as the operational center.
open_questions: PR49 should test whether this card helps packets integrate options without smoothing over weak evidence.

absence_records.reason: The source warns that polished narrative becomes dangerous when it creates coherence before claims, evidence quality, or causal links are pressure-tested.

source_evidence.source_quote: A polished narrative becomes actively dangerous when it creates coherence before the underlying claims, evidence quality, or causal links have been pressure-tested.

absence_records.reason: The source defines synthesis as actionable connection, so PR48 must not treat a summary or evidence dump as reviewed operational depth.

source_evidence.source_quote: finding the ideas that matter most and connecting them in a way that is highly actionable
gather findings from various sources—data, analysis, interviews, and modeling—and reorganize them into a **coherent or functional whole**.

review_notes.normalization_note: Batch 11 source reading found strong reviewed depth for synthesis-and-integration as governing thought construction with a verification boundary.
dropped_material: No runtime, prompt, lane, packet, deterministic pressure, deterministic option selection, or user-facing change is implied.
open_questions: Later packet review should test whether this card improves integration without making every candidate look equally important.
